case_title: SARRIAS, WALTER J. vs. OLVERA, JOAQUIN ESCORCIA, IND/DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SARRIAS, WALTER J. AS TO DEFENDANT OLVERA, JOAQUIN ESCORCIA, IND/DBA AURORAS JANITORIAL & MAINTENANCE SERVICE
